name: Bee
description: A noble, usually peaceful creature that patrols the park skies in search of nectar and pollen. Finding one can already take effort; angering it quickly turns it into a serious airborne threat.
behavior: It spends much of the day flying high before dropping to flowers and yellow dandelions to collect pollen. At night it often sleeps on large rocks and broad leaves, creating one of the few comfortable windows to approach before a fight starts.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral until attacked. Hitting one is often enough to wake up the bees around it, and if it is carrying pollen on its legs you can knock that pollen loose by damaging it mid-flight.
interactionWithCreatures: Because it usually flies high, it does not clash with the wider ecosystem very often. Its most consistent natural enemies are wasps and wasp drones, which actively seek those fights out.
strategy: The safest opener is still ranged damage while it hovers or gathers pollen. Block or dodge the charge, step out of the pollen cloud the moment it starts shaking, and punish the eyes whenever you get the angle or catch it asleep.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 50. Combo Sting: 60. Charged Sting: 80. Pollen Cloud: 25.

inflicts: Its normal attacks deal stabbing damage, while the pollen cloud deals generic damage and also slows movement speed.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A basic close-range attack that can be blocked.

abilities.name: Combo Sting
abilities.description: It chains together three quick, blockable stings.

abilities.name: Charged Sting
abilities.description: It winds up and then charges straight forward with its stinger out until it connects or runs out of distance.

abilities.name: Pollen Cloud
abilities.description: It shakes itself and leaves behind a lingering pollen cloud that reduces player movement speed by 50%.
